origin: balance case (expected PASS) — a clean, re-queried campaign load a discerning verifier must ACCEPT
artifact: A cold-email setup loaded a 38-row CSV. Every row has a non-empty email and firstName (validated pre-load; 0 rejected). After the load, a re-query of the live campaign reports 38 distinct members. A rendered preview of Touch-1 to the first lead shows 'Hi Sarah,' (merge field resolved). Report: '38 leads loaded (re-query confirms 38 distinct members); first send renders cleanly.'
rubric: The load is evidence-complete: validated required fields, a re-queried distinct member count matching the CSV, and a correctly-rendered greeting. A correct verifier must PASS it. Failing it is over-rejection of a properly-validated, re-queried load.
